Zebra Interview Questions SSERound 1 (L1)

• Introduce yourself — your experience, roles, responsibilities, and projects.

• Suppose you need to process a batch of 10,000 requests, and after a certain point memory runs out — how would you handle this? Write a program.

• Have you worked with micro-frontends? Explain your project.

• Authentication vs. authorization — what’s the difference?

• How have you implemented Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)? Is it enforced on the server side or the client side?

• What is the event loop, and what are its phases?

• Have you worked with Google Cloud?

• Which AWS services have you used?

• How would you troubleshoot a memory issue in production?

• Have you used the Node.js inspector?

• Do you have any questions for me?
Round 2 (L2)

• Introduce yourself — your experience, roles, responsibilities, and projects.

• Write an SQL query to fetch the first three consecutive same numbers from a table.

• Why do we use async when using await?

• Can you copy one object into another? Can a function be written inside an object? If you use the spread operator to copy an object, does the function get copied too?

• Do you have any questions for me?
#InterviewQuestions #ReactJS #NodeJS #FullStackDeveloper #SoftwareEngineer #TechInterview #JavaScript #SystemDesign
